description: Recent reports discuss GitHub Copilot's Kimi K2.7, Moonshot AI's success, and the implications of the Kimi K3 model.

sections.heading: GitHub Copilot and Kimi K2.7
paragraphs: According to tech-insider.org, GitHub Copilot is associated with a model called Kimi K2.7. The source describes this as the 'First Open Model' with a price of $0.95/M.

sections.heading: Moonshot AI's Progress
paragraphs: Bloomberg.com reports that the Chinese AI sensation Moonshot has seen its gamble on big models pay off.

sections.heading: Geopolitical AI Implications
paragraphs: The Information has published an analysis on what the new Kimi K3 model really means for the U.S.-China AI race.

sections.heading: Search Trend Data
paragraphs: The keyword 'copilot' is trending in the ID region. Google Trends reported a search lower bound of 200, with a trend feed published on July 20, 2026.
